subject: Re: Serena Boardman 41 East 65th Street
body:
price?

--- Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com> wrote:

> Dear Cecilia and Lesley:
> 
> Please let Jeffrey know that I went to preview 41
> East 65th Street for him.
> The house could definitely work for his needs as
> while retaining the
> original staircase, entrance hall and two receiving
> rooms, which are very
> attractive, it has otherwise been turned into office
> space and the overall
> condition is very good/workable for corporate use. 
> That said the house does
> not have commercial zoning and is currently being
> used for a non profit
> organization (the American Federation of the Arts)
> so it could only be (at
> least officially) used for his foundation. Also
> Jeffrey may be interested to
> know that the house is built almost full and has
> very good scale and
> attractive outlooks.
> 
> Let me know if Jeffrey is indeed interested.
> 
> Regards,
> Serena
> (917) 667-2468 cell
> (212) 606-7611 work

body_html:
price?

--- Cecilia Steen cecilia.steen@gmail.com wrote:

Dear Cecilia and Lesley:

Please let Jeffrey know that I went to preview 41
East 65th Street for him.
The house could definitely work for his needs as
while retaining the
original staircase, entrance hall and two receiving
rooms, which are very
attractive, it has otherwise been turned into office
space and the overall
condition is very good/workable for corporate use.
That said the house does
not have commercial zoning and is currently being
used for a non profit
organization (the American Federation of the Arts)
so it could only be (at
least officially) used for his foundation. Also
Jeffrey may be interested to
know that the house is built almost full and has
very good scale and
attractive outlooks.

Let me know if Jeffrey is indeed interested.

Regards,
Serena
(917) 667-2468 cell
(212) 606-7611 work
